---
name: Upstream attribution / licensing concern
about: You are Gunnar Ritter, a licence-holder, or an upstream maintainer
title: '[attribution] '
labels: attribution, priority-high
---

<!--
This issue template is for the upstream Heirloom maintainer, the
Ritter estate, Sun/Oracle (OpenSolaris), Caldera/SCO successors,
Bell Labs / Lucent / Alcatel-Lucent / Nokia successors, or any
licence-holder or contributor to any Heirloom-derived code.

If you have a concern about how this repository frames its
relationship to upstream, attributes original authors, or handles
licence terms, please file it here. The publisher will treat this
category as priority-high.

If you would prefer private contact first, open a GitHub Security
Advisory (that channel is private and allows off-list discussion),
or email the publisher via GitHub's contact link.
-->

## Your relationship to the upstream code

<!-- Optional but helpful. Examples:
  * Original author of file X
  * Estate representative for Gunnar Ritter
  * Legal counsel for licence-holder
  * Successor entity of an original licensing party
  * Downstream distributor with an interest in coherent attribution -->

## Concern

<!-- What is the issue? Examples:
  * Attribution should be strengthened / weakened / removed
  * Licence framing in NOTICE.md is inaccurate
  * A specific file is missing an original copyright header
  * The AI-DISCLOSURE.md posture is inadequate
  * Content should be removed entirely -->

## Requested remedy

<!-- What would resolve this? Examples:
  * Update NOTICE.md wording to X
  * Add attribution line to specific file(s)
  * Take down the repository
  * Redirect port patches upstream via git format-patch -->

## Deadline / urgency

<!-- Optional. If there is a legal or time-sensitive dimension,
     state it clearly. The publisher will prioritise. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else relevant. -->
